SELECT p.name, v.market_value, v.valuation_date FROM properties p JOIN valuations v ON v.property_id = p.property_id WHERE p.status != 'Sold' AND v.valuation_date = (SELECT MAX(valuation_date) FROM valuations WHERE property_id = p.property_id)

SELECT p.name, v.market_value, v.valuation_date FROM properties p JOIN valuations v ON v.property_id = p.property_id WHERE p.status != 'Sold' AND v.valuation_date = (SELECT MAX(valuation_date) FROM valuations WHERE property_id = p.property_id)

SELECT p.name, v.market_value, v.valuation_date FROM properties p JOIN valuations v ON v.property_id = p.property_id WHERE p.status != 'Sold' AND v.valuation_date = (SELECT MAX(valuation_date) FROM valuations WHERE property_id = p.property_id)

WITH cte AS (SELECT p.name, SUM(f.net_operating_income) AS total FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end >= '2026-07-01' AND f.period_end <= '2027-07-01' GROUP BY p.name) SELECT rnk, name, total FROM cte ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10

WITH cte AS (SELECT p.name, f.net_operating_income FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end >= '2026-07-01' AND f.period_end <= '2027-07-01') SELECT rnk, name, net_operating_income FROM cte WHERE net_operating_income > 0 ORDER BY net_operating_income DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT rnk, p.name, net_operating_income FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end >= '2025-07-01' AND f.period_end <= '2026-07-01' ORDER BY net_operating_income DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT market, name FROM (SELECT market, name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY market ORDER BY current_market_value DESC) AS rn FROM properties WHERE status != 'Sold') WHERE rn = 1
SELECT market, name FROM (SELECT market, name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY market ORDER BY current_market_value DESC) AS rn FROM properties WHERE status != 'Sold') WHERE rn = 1

SELECT name, market, current_market_value FROM (SELECT name, market, current_market_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY market ORDER BY current_market_value DESC) AS rn FROM properties WHERE status != 'Sold') WHERE rn = 1

SELECT p.property_type, SUM(l.annual_base_rent) / (SELECT SUM(l.annual_base_rent) FROM leases l WHERE status IN ('Active', 'Holdover') GROUP BY p.property_type) FROM leases l JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = l.property_id WHERE l.status IN ('Active', 'Holdover') GROUP BY p.property_type

SELECT p.property_type, SUM(l.annual_base_rent) / (SELECT SUM(l.annual_base_rent) FROM leases l JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = l.property_id WHERE p.status != 'Sold') FROM leases l JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = l.property_id WHERE p.status != 'Sold' GROUP BY p.property_type

SELECT p.property_type, SUM(l.annual_base_rent) / (SELECT SUM(l.annual_base_rent) FROM leases l) FROM leases l JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = l.property_id WHERE l.status IN ('Active', 'Holdover') GROUP BY p.property_type

SELECT p.name, a.occupancy_rate, b.occupancy_rate FROM properties p JOIN property_financials a ON a.property_id = p.property_id AND a.period_end = '2025-06-30' JOIN property_financials b ON b.property_id = p.property_id AND b.period_end = '2026-06-30'

SELECT p.name, t.name, l.leased_sqft FROM leases l JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = l.property_id JOIN tenants t ON t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id WHERE p.property_type = 'Office' AND l.status = 'Active' ORDER BY l.leased_sqft DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT name, tenant FROM (SELECT p.name AS name, t.name AS tenant, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY p.property_id ORDER BY l.leased_sqft DESC) AS rn FROM leases l JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = l.property_id JOIN tenants t ON t.tenant_id = l.tenant_id WHERE p.property_type = 'Office' AND l.status = 'Active') WHERE rn = 1

SELECT name, f.occupancy_rate FROM properties p JOIN funds f ON f.fund_id = p.fund_id WHERE p.period_end = '2026-06-30' AND f.occupancy_rate > 0.90
SELECT name, AVG(occupancy_rate) FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end = '2026-06-30' GROUP BY name HAVING AVG(occupancy_rate) > 0.90

SELECT f.name, AVG(l.occupancy_rate) FROM leases l JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = l.property_id JOIN funds f ON f.fund_id = p.fund_id WHERE p.period_end = '2026-06-30' AND l.occupancy_rate > 0.90 GROUP BY f.name
SELECT name, f.occupancy_rate FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end >= '2026-01-01' AND f.period_end <= '2026-12-31'
SELECT name, 1 - f.occupancy_rate FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end >= '2026-01-01' AND f.period_end <= '2026-12-31'
SELECT name, 1 - f.occupancy_rate FROM property_financials f JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = f.property_id WHERE f.period_end >= '2026-01-01' AND f.period_end <= '2026-12-31'
SELECT DISTINCT t.name FROM tenants t JOIN leases l ON l.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE l.status = 'Active' AND l.year_built >= 2025
SELECT DISTINCT t.name FROM tenants t JOIN leases l ON l.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE l.status = 'Active' AND l.leased_sqft > 0 AND l.year_built >= 2025
SELECT t.name FROM tenants t JOIN leases l ON l.tenant_id = t.tenant_id WHERE l.status = 'Active' AND l.year_built >= 2025
